notes: Narrow June mushroom season/route cleanup after v4.3.163.
Adds June visibility for Aspen oyster and the Green-cracking / Quilted Green Russula group based on source-supported season windows.
Keeps Birch polypore visible as traditional tea/utility/other-use material but removes it from normal edible mushroom routing by changing its food role to tea_extract_only.
No broad edible-route code-gate changes; legitimate edible-with-caution records remain eligible for normal mushroom lists.
